feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Link not working
entry.content:
Hello,

The link in community page doesn't work, can this be update please? 
This is the link https://learning.sap.com/learning-journey/develop-extensions-using-sap-s-4hana-cloud-abap-environment.

entry.title: Open hyperlink in new tab instead in same window, added in SAP RAP report using custom entity
entry.content:
Fiori report is generated using "define custom entity" approach and exposed to Fiori launchpad using service definition and service binding.

In report output, for Billing document number, hyperlink should be enabled and on click should be navigated to Fiori app "Display Billing Document".

This is achieved using below annotations:

@Consumption.semanticObject: 'BillingDocument'
@ui.lineItem : [ { position: 10, label: 'Billing Document'},
{type : #FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION, semanticObjectAction: 'display'}]
key BillingDoc : vbeln;

Hyperlink is working fine but opening in same window, but as per business requirement, we need to open this in new tab. Can someone suggest how to achieve this.

entry.title: Saving Files in S/4HANA Cloud Public using ABAP
entry.content:
Hello, community!

I'm working on a migration project to S/4HANA Cloud Public that requires me to save files using ABAP. In the past, I've used function modules (like SO_DOCUMENT_INSERT_API1) and classes to achieve this, but I understand these are not available in the S/4HANA Cloud, embedded ABAP environment.

My goal is to be able to save, read, and delete files in a flexible manner in S/4HANA Cloud Public, embedded ABAP, similar to how we could in traditional ABAP.

Currently, I'm aware of the cl_attachment_service_api, but it seems to require files to be saved associated with a standard SAP Object Type.

Is there a way to achieve more flexible file handling capabilities in S/4HANA Cloud Public, perhaps through an alternative approach?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks!

entry.title: User Exit For IW47
entry.content:
hello,

i need to add a field in the input parameters to the IW47 transaction
should i use a user exit? which one should i use?

thanks

entry.title: Cannot use HRUS_D2 in RAP Application
entry.content:
Hello,

          I have to create a very simple APP to manage substitution using table HRUS_D2, however after having added the necessary fields for RAP development, I tried to create the dictionary objects but I kept getting message that "Use of table HRUS_D2 was not permitted". After having researched a bit I got to know that  table has to be release for API and I get an error.

In the mean while is there any way I can use this table for RAP development?

If no, what are my alternatives ?

entry.title: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, I would like to obtain the C_ABAPD certification.
I need more infos about the necessary path to get to it.
Until know i haven´t found any proper guide to it.

Thanks

entry.title: Make attachment mandatory in me51n
entry.content: Hii , i got one task , in me51n upper left corner we can see button by clicking that we can attach document in PR . Functional asked me to make it mandatory for all PR ...and if attachment is not uploaded system should throw an error and couldn't save PR ..

entry.title: Manage in house bank account not opening from Fiori
entry.content:
Dear SAP Guru,

During open Manage in house bank account from fiori I am getting the below error.

Title: ErrorMessage: App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded.Details: { "info": "Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent \"#InhouseBankAccount-manage\"", "technicalMessage": "Failed to fetch.\nTypeError: Failed to fetch.\n at XMLHttpRequest.<anonymous> (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:168:1453)\n at o (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:3967)\n at r.dispatch (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:4619)\n at a.handleEvent (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:29547)\n at XMLHttpRequest.t [as _fnHandler] (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:29890)"}

Please suggest.

Thanks & regards,

Subhasis.

entry.title: BOM material should not reflect on Sales Order at item but on SO print should reflect?
entry.content:
Hi, 

is Anyone can help me to sort my client requirement?

My Client is using SAP Public Cloud and they required the below.

They need BOM material should not reflect on Sales Order item level, but it should come on Sales Order print form and also production will be done for the material.

Thanks and regards

Mani Sajnani

entry.title: reference information missing or data type wrong using abap cds views with entity
entry.content:
Hi,

I am developing abap cds views with entity and below code  and getting error ZI_PLANNING-MON1 reference information missing or data type wrong, see long text

 

 

define view entity ZI_PLANNING as select from ZPS_REVENUE_PLAN

 

{

key proj_def as ProjDef,

key wbs_no as WbsNo,

key item_no as ItemNo,

key zyear as Zyear,

key vsn as Vsn,

tcurr as Tcurr,

deptm as Deptm,

dept_desc as DeptDesc,

prart_lvl4 as PrartLvl4,

prart_lvl5 as PrartLvl5,

prart_lvl6 as PrartLvl6,

prart_des4 as PrartDes4,

prart_des5 as PrartDes5,

prart_des6 as PrartDes6,

 

mon_1 as Mon1,

mon_2 as Mon2,

mon_3 as Mon3,

mon_4 as Mon4,

mon_5 as Mon5,

mon_6 as Mon6,

mon_7 as Mon7,

mon_8 as Mon8,

mon_9 as Mon9,

mon_10 as Mon10,

mon_11 as Mon11,

mon_12 as Mon12,

created_date as CreatedDate,

changed_date as ChangedDate,

created_by as CreatedBy,

changed_by as ChangedBy,

del_ind as DelInd,

remark as Remark,

tot_cost as TotCost,

tot_rev_cst as TotRevCst,

status as Status,

proj_def_back as ProjDefBack,

wbs_def_back as WbsDefBack,

billable as Billable

}

entry.title: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content:
hi,

i added a custom field in append in RIHAFVR structure.

But when i launch transaction IW47 the field is not displayed in alv.

How can i display the field?

 

thank you

entry.title: how to read RSTXT-TXLINE field
entry.content:
Hi,

inside the RIAFRU20 report enanchment I have to read the RSTXT-TXLINE field 

 

I have already tried the FM READ_TEXT but it wants the "Name" as input, I don't know the "Name" inside the enhancement 

how can i do?

entry.title: Adobe forms -Grouping
entry.content:
I want to group the line items based on material group in table level. I have tried some scripts. But it couldn't work. Pls provide any solution / script related to this.(Adobe LiveCycle designer 11 for sap solutions)

SAP Forms service by Adobe  SAP Interactive Forms by Adobe  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

#Adobe live cycle designer

entry.title: Cds parameter length getting doubled in PaPM
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have created a CDS view with parameter of length 4 and when PaPM team is trying to use the CDS view as data source they see the length of parameter as 8.

Has anyone faced this type of issue.?

 

Regards, 

Naga

entry.title: how to find existing smartform program driver
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 I am new to smartforms. I have a smart forms requirement.

how to find existing smartform driver program?

entry.title: Updating Condition Data in SAP - Alternatives to MODIFY
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm experiencing performance issues when using the MODIFY statement to update a large number of records from an internal table. The process is taking a significant amount of time, and suggest me if there is any ways to us to modify table instead of modify keyword .

entry.title: I am trying to create a Date Range to get a total of a measure, here from_date is an user input
entry.content: Here from_date is a user input and to_date will be 180 days before the from_date, using this I will set a range in CDS view and get the total of Netwr from VBRP for the purticular period of time

entry.title: cannot communicate with the nf-e on cloud service
entry.content:
Hi,

I got the "cannot communicate with the nf-e on cloud service" error while uploading the certificate in nfe_mng_cert T-code in my quality system.

I checked the RFC, Oauth2 settings, batch jobs and 3206768 note implemented.

I could not be able to find out the root cause.

Please help me on this.

entry.title: How to append an existing custom structure to a standard table
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a custom structure and I need to add it in append inside a standard table.

but if I click the "Append structure" button it tells me that the structure already exists:

I don't want to create the structure, because it already exists, but I just need to add it to the standard table. How can I do that?

 

thank you

entry.title: RAP, create child entities based on static factory action
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on RAP Application where it consists of a Parent Entity with 3 child entities.
The Application is Managed with Late numbering.
I added a Action button at Child entity that it should create an entry/entries depends on inputs of action button pop-up.

When Purchase Order and/or Purchase item input is given, child entities are to be created and added at line item.




In Root view behavior, action is defined as 

  static factory action  getPurc parameter YINV_COPY_PO [1];

 For action button input, created an Abstract entity YINV_COPY_PO

@EndUserText.label: 'Copy PO Abstract entity'
define abstract entity YINV_COPY_PO
{
   @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: 'I_PurchaseOrder', element: 'PurchaseOrder' } }]
    ebeln : ebeln;
    ebelp : ebelp;   
}


yi_rbkp is parent entity with belnr, gjahr as key fields whereas yi_rseg is child entity with key fields as belnr,gjahr,buzei. The child entities have to be created based on ebeln and ebelp as these are not dependent of the Parent entity key fields. 

The below method logic could be incorrect and it ends up in below runtime error.

Method logic in Behavior

  METHOD getPurc.

    DATA lt_item TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE yi_rbkp\\yi_rbkp\_itm.
    DATA(ls_param) = VALUE #( keys[ 1 ]-%param OPTIONAL ).

    IF ls_param-ebelp IS INITIAL.
      SELECT * FROM
      ekpo INTO TABLE
      @DATA(lt_ekpo)
      WHERE ebeln = @LS_param-ebeln.
    ELSEIF ls_param-ebeln IS NOT INITIAL AND ls_param-ebelp IS NOT INITIAL.
      SELECT * FROM
      ekpo INTO TABLE
      @LT_ekpo
      WHERE ebeln = @LS_param-ebeln
      AND ebelp = @LS_param-ebelp.
    ELSEIF ls_param IS INITIAL.
      EXIT.
    ENDIF.

    READ ENTITIES OF yi_rbkp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY yi_rseg BY \_hdr
    ALL FIELDS
    WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(lt_rbkp).

    LOOP AT keys ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<key>).
      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_item ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<item>).

      <item>-%cid_ref = <key>-%cid.
      <item>-%is_draft = <key>-%param-%is_draft.
      LOOP AT  lt_ekpo ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ekpo>).
        APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <item>-%target ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<targ>).
        <targ>-%data = CORRESPONDING #( <ekpo> ).
        <targ>-%cid = <key>-%cid.
        <targ>-%is_draft = '01'.
        <targ>-%control-ebeln = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-ebelp = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-gjahr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-matnr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-menge = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-shkzg = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-waers = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-werks = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-wrbtr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-zekkn = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDLOOP.

    MODIFY ENTITIES of yi_rbkp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY yi_rseg   
    CREATE BY \_itm
    AUTO FILL CID
    FROM lt_item
    MAPPED DATA(ls_mapped)
         FAILED   DATA(ls_failed_modify)
         REPORTED DATA(ls_reported_modify).

    IF ls_failed_modify IS NOT INITIAL.
      failed = ls_failed_modify.
      reported = ls_reported_modify.
      RETURN.
    ENDIF.

    mapped-yi_rseg = ls_mapped-yi_rseg.
  ENDMETHOD.


Runtime error
